title: epiphyllum alatum
intro: Epiphyllum alatum, also known as the climbing epiphyllum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cactaceae. It is a type of epiphyte that grows on trees, using them as a support system, and produces showy white flowers at night, followed by red fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Epiphyllum alatum include reducing inflammation and fighting infections, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil for medicinal use.
